headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — use today to drive the AE-1079 'no ground truth' evaluations design doc forward before the week ramps up.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth credentials so dashboards are available for the week
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken; you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the design doc for AE-1079: Generated evaluations without ground truth
must_make_progress.why: Only active ticket on your board, no due date set yet — Monday is the best deep-work window before the week fills up; evals is a key 26.4+ deliverable per OKRs

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock Agents bi-weekly TR page and align your evals work with the 26.4+ deliverables list
must_make_progress.why: Ensures your design doc addresses the latest scoping for evals adoption, Context Engineering, and related agent lifecycle items

must_communicate_with.about: Align on the no-ground-truth evaluation approach — get their input on feasibility and model-based eval methods before finalizing the design doc
Coordinate on how generated evals intersect with validation patterns (DeepRAG, BatchTransform) and document processing

must_report_status.topic: AE-1079 design doc progress and target completion date
must_report_status.note: Set a due date on the ticket and share an ETA before the next bi-weekly TR

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to restore dashboard

evals_adoption.vs_goal: Key 26.4 deliverable; no telemetry accessible today

flags: Salesforce auth is failing (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations or high-priority cases. Resolve ASAP.
Snowflake credentials are empty — product telemetry and MBR dashboard data are inaccessible.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of it drifting without a committed deadline.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in OKRs — monitor for spillover impact on evals work.

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations or decisions visible today due to broken Salesforce/Snowflake integrations — restoring access is prerequisite to any data-driven action this week.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are unavailable; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the highest-leverage adoption-driving work available today.

slack_summary: Clear day with no meetings — best use of time is driving the AE-1079 generated evaluations (no ground truth) design doc forward, which is your only active Jira ticket and a key 26.4 deliverable. Top urgent item: fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth so you have visibility into escalations and product metrics before the week picks up. Zero meetings today.
